item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in ordinary execution mode, treated the three prior onboarding changes as unrelated work items, and provided a practical step plan for adding the device pickup entry.
